_meta.title: Pipeline Execution Readiness Report
_meta.purpose: Per-pipeline execution readiness. Shows whether each pipeline can actually execute end-to-end today vs. what is blocked or pending provider wiring.

executionStatusVocabulary.RUNNABLE: All required steps have a working provider. Can execute today.
executionStatusVocabulary.PARTIAL: Core steps work but optional steps need provider wiring.
executionStatusVocabulary.DEMO_ONLY: Executes with demo/placeholder data. Real provider wiring pending.
executionStatusVocabulary.NEEDS_SETUP: Requires user setup (install server, add API key) before any step runs.
executionStatusVocabulary.BLOCKED: A required step has no working provider. Cannot execute.

pipelines.description: Core editing works via browser APIs. Optional steps (music provider fetch, TTS) need provider wiring.

steps.name: Text / Titles
steps.blockReason: Google Fonts needs network; Bunny Fonts is fallback

steps.name: Music / SFX
steps.blockReason: Demo WAV files play. Pixabay/Mixkit/Freesound connectors not yet built.

steps.name: Voice Track
steps.blockReason: Kokoro/Piper/XTTS require local server install.

pipelines.notes: Pipeline is usable for editing. Music plays from demo. Export works.

pipelines.description: Asset browser UI is built. Provider connectors (Pexels, Pixabay) need API keys and connector code.

steps.name: Query / Browse
steps.blockReason: Pexels/Pixabay need API keys. Coverr/Wikimedia/NASA are keyless but connectors not built.

pipelines.notes: UI shell exists. Needs connector code + API keys to browse real assets.

pipelines.description: Music and SFX panels show demo audio from on-disk WAV files. Preview plays real audio. Add to timeline stores file path. Real provider connectors not yet built.
outputValidation: preview plays real audio (not silence, not beep)
Add button creates timeline track item with src field
timeline item src resolves to playable audio
asset recorded in LoadAssetRegistry with mimeType audio/*

steps.name: Browse / Search
steps.blockReason: Shows demo items only. Pixabay Music/Mixkit/Freesound connectors not built.

steps.name: Preview
steps.blockReason: Demo WAV plays from assets/audio/demo/. Provider audio fetch not wired.

steps.name: Timeline Insert
steps.blockReason: Adds demo file path to timeline. Real provider download not wired.

blockers: Pixabay Music / Freesound / Mixkit connectors not built
LoadAssetRegistry.addAsset not called on Add (assetRegistryWrite false)
pipelines.notes: Demo audio plays correctly. User sees real waveform previews. Provider wiring is the next step.

pipelines.description: Pollinations free tier works as fallback. ComfyUI/A1111 work if user has local server. Identity steps need setup.
outputValidation: image blob returned (not null, not error)

steps.name: Prompt Build
steps.blockReason: Ollama needs local server. Pollinations text works as fallback.

steps.name: Image Generate
steps.blockReason: Pollinations/AI Horde work. ComfyUI/A1111 need local install.

steps.name: Identity Lock
steps.blockReason: IP-Adapter / InstantID need ComfyUI + model download.

steps.name: Enhance
steps.blockReason: CodeFormer/ESRGAN need local server.

blockers: Identity consistency (step 3) not runnable without local SD setup
pipelines.notes: Basic image generation works via Pollinations. Identity locking needs local setup.

pipelines.description: Requires ComfyUI or A1111 with commercial-safe model. No cloud fallback without paying API.

steps.name: Generate
steps.blockReason: Needs local SD with commercially-safe model (e.g. FLUX schnell).

blockers: No commercial-safe cloud image provider wired
pipelines.notes: Pollinations output may not be commercial-safe without review. ComfyUI + FLUX schnell is the recommended path.

pipelines.description: Full ComfyUI workflow execution. Requires local ComfyUI server with models loaded.

steps.name: Connect
steps.blockReason: localhost:8188 must be reachable.

steps.name: Queue
steps.blockReason: Same.

steps.name: Poll
steps.blockReason: Same.

steps.name: Download
steps.blockReason: Same.

pipelines.notes: Connector code reads endpoint from registry. User must install ComfyUI and set endpoint.

pipelines.description: Routes LLM calls to Ollama (local), LM Studio, or OpenRouter. Local path works if Ollama is running.

steps.name: Send Request
steps.blockReason: Ollama works if running. OpenRouter needs API key. OpenAI needs paid key.

blockers: Cloud LLM providers need API keys
pipelines.notes: Local Ollama path works today if user has Ollama installed.

pipelines.description: Unified routing to any local AI server. Works once user sets up at least one local server.

steps.name: Probe Endpoint
steps.blockReason: Needs at least one running local server.

steps.name: Route Request
steps.blockReason: Same.

steps.name: Return Asset
steps.blockReason: Same.

blockers: No local servers running in default state
pipelines.notes: Designed for power users with local GPU setups.

pipelines.description: Browser TTS works natively. High-quality TTS (Kokoro, Piper) requires local server.

steps.name: Synthesize
steps.blockReason: Browser TTS works. Kokoro/Piper need local server.

blockers: High-quality TTS needs local server setup
pipelines.notes: Browser TTS provides working baseline. Local TTS servers add quality.

pipelines.description: Whisper WASM and Vosk work in-browser. Higher-accuracy models need local server.

steps.name: Transcribe
steps.blockReason: Whisper WASM works but is slow on iPad. Faster-Whisper needs local server.

blockers: Accurate transcription is slow in WASM on iPad
pipelines.notes: Functional. Performance may be limited on iPad without server-side help.

pipelines.description: MusicGen / AudioGen / Riffusion all need local server. No free cloud fallback available today.

steps.name: Generate
steps.blockReason: MusicGen/AudioGen/Riffusion all need local GPU server.

blockers: No free cloud music generation provider wired
pipelines.notes: Needs local GPU. Hugging Face Spaces could be added as a free fallback but has rate limits.

pipelines.description: WAN, HunyuanVideo, LTX-Video etc. all require local GPU server. Heavy compute.

steps.name: Generate
steps.blockReason: All video gen models need local GPU server.

blockers: All video gen providers require local GPU setup
pipelines.notes: Very heavy workload. Designed for local workstation / Mac Studio setups.

pipelines.description: MuseTalk, Wav2Lip, SadTalker, LivePortrait all require local server.

steps.name: Lip Sync
steps.blockReason: MuseTalk/Wav2Lip/SadTalker need local server.

blockers: All lip sync providers need local setup
pipelines.notes: Key feature for character animation. Requires local server.

pipelines.description: Packages project into a standalone CinePWA. No external providers needed — all local.
outputValidation: No API keys included in package
No tokens in any exported JSON
pipelines.notes: Fully self-contained. No network required. Keys are scrubbed before packaging.
